signed_concordance_note: signed_concordance is reported ONLY for the signed cone ranking; for the non-negative magnitude / abs-correlation baselines it is undefined (sign is always +, collapsing to the fixed Th2-label fraction), so it is NaN in the CSV.
verdict: cone ranking beats magnitude baseline on direction
note: Directional ranking validated against a curated 13-gene polarization panel; the effect-magnitude ranking is the GRN-naive baseline. A full GRN reference (CellOracle/CellNet) comparison is noted as a stronger future control.
